user.title: SonicBit Media Sync
user.description: Connect your SonicBit seedbox. Completed torrents will be automatically downloaded to the local path and removed from the cloud.

data_description.storage_path: Absolute path on the host where files will be saved (e.g. /media/sonicbit). Must be writable by the Home Assistant process.
data_description.remote_folder: Folder name on SonicBit My Drive where torrents added via this integration will be stored (e.g. from-ha). When set, only torrents in this folder are synced locally. Leave empty to sync all completed torrents.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SonicBit. Please check your email and password.

abort.already_configured: This SonicBit account is already configured.

add_torrent.name: Add Torrent
add_torrent.description: Add a new torrent to the SonicBit seedbox. Accepts a magnet link, a URL to a .torrent file, or an absolute path to a local .torrent file on the Home Assistant host.

uri.name: URI
uri.description: Magnet link (magnet:?xt=…), URL to a remote .torrent file (https://…), or absolute local path to a .torrent file (/config/downloads/file.torrent).
